name: Tangy Short Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the short ribs into 2-inch pieces.
2. Place the beef ribs in a 4-quart casserole or microwave-safe bowl.
3. Mix together the lemon juice, sliced onion, steak sauce, minced garlic, salt, chili powder, ground cumin, and black pepper.
4. Pour the mixture over the ribs, making sure they are evenly coated.
5. Refrigerate for about 1 hour, turning occasionally.
6. Cover tightly and microwave on medium (50%) power until the ribs are tender, about 1 1/4 to 1 1/2 hours. Be sure to rearrange the ribs every 30 minutes for even cooking.
